rulings.Case Title: STANLEY G HILTON VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 23 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY AND DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. First cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege valid grounds for tender exception; Third cause of action, overrule; and sixth cause of action, sustain with leave to amend. = (501/REQ)
